detail: all RISCs waiting (W); CB counts audited balanced; triage callstack dump failed (ElfFile import error). Suspect boot init or matmul helper deadlock.
TR0(unpack) stuck after P0 inside QK matmul P1; TR1(math)+TR2(pack) past P1 stalled in P3a reduce. Boot-init and transpose ruled out. Static analyzer: matmul->reduce(WaitUpfrontNoPop) TRISC desync.

description: Debug SDPA QK matmul unpack hang

detail: held (no-pop) operands in 1D B_q chains (phases 3b m_prev, 4 m_run, 5 alpha) changed Scalar->Block + HeldBulk. Scalar on a non-popped operand reads tile 0 every iter (wrong for B_q>1). non_square (n_kv=2,B_q=4) now PASS.
32/32 in both --dev and production (non-dev) mode — no races

L1-aware block cap (B*DHt<=16) fixes 7/8 large-head-dim OOM cases (D=512 all pass, D=1024 3/4). Remaining: D=1024 explicit-scale rms=0.0505 vs 0.05 precision near-miss (PCC 0.9987 ok). fp32_dest_acc lever risks reduce HiFi4 known-bad -> follow-up refinement.
32/32 after comment fix; golden 207/208 supported cells pass
HiFi4 default disproves 38306; fp32 intermediates fix fp32+fp32_acc=False (0.367->0.9999); bf8b requires fp32_dest_acc=True (boundary, 64 skipped)

note: acc_dtype must be fp32 whenever input is non-bf16 (fp32 OR bf8b). bf16 intermediate fed from non-bf16 input CB through matmul->reduce->eltwise yields rel-RMS>1 when fp32_dest_acc off. fp32 input fixed by fp32 intermediates; bf8b still needs fp32_dest_acc=True at the dest level.

detail: bf8b needs NO EXCLUSIONS on aligned shapes; fp32-dest-acc default carries deep-D/deep-KV
128x1024 red cell now passing (Phase0 was 207+1fail); no XPASS drift

params: bf16 208p/40xf, fp32 208p/40xf, bf8b 208p/40xf = 624 passed, 120 xfailed (non-aligned R2), 0 failed

note: Two issues for non-aligned: (1) descriptor uses floor division for DHt/Sq_t/Sk_t dropping the partial last tile; (2) padded S_kv columns score 0 then exp(0-m) pollutes softmax denominator and need -inf masking. w_non_aligned (D not %32) may just work after ceil fix if from_torch zero-pads inputs (QK/PV contract over zero padding = 0). h_non_aligned needs S_kv column masking.

Probe with ceil fix only (no masking): w_non_aligned PCC=1.00000 max_abs~0.004 (WORKS - from_torch zero-pads, QK/PV contract over zero); h_non_aligned PCC~0.999 max_abs 0.11-0.15 (FAILS softmax denom). both_50_50 also fails (S_kv=50 not aligned). Trigger for masking = S_kv%32!=0, NOT the alignment tag.
Ceil division for DHt/Sq_t/Sk_t in program descriptor (was floor, dropped partial last tile). Added kv_partial = S_kv % 32.
After pad-mask: h_non_aligned_S47 PCC 0.99926->1.00000 max_abs 0.15->0.003; h_non_aligned_S100 PCC->1.0; both_50_50 PCC->1.0; w_non_aligned & aligned still PCC=1.0. Face-major mask mapping correct.

Reader generates persistent additive -inf KV-column pad mask (face-major, dtype-aware fp32/bf16); compute adds it held on last kv block before rowmax. SUPPORTED[alignment] += w_non_aligned, h_non_aligned.

All non-aligned cells PCC~1.0. fp32 true-rms~0.003, bf8b true-rms~0.015 (probe rrms was L2-norm not normalized-rms, ~226x off). bf8b x non-aligned WORKS - no EXCLUSIONS needed. from_torch bf8b zero-pad + fp32 pad mask + fp32 acc handle it.

744 passed, 1 skipped, 0 failed, 0 xfailed (was 624 passed + 120 xfailed at R1). ALL 120 non-aligned cells now pass including bf8b x non-aligned. No EXCLUSIONS needed. Full TARGET cartesian supported.

test: non_aligned (135 dev + 135 non-dev), debug+baseline+precision_matrix (390), acceptance (32), golden (744)
note: Refinement 2 FULL [x]. All non-aligned cells pass incl bf8b. No regression on aligned/precision paths. No race (dev==non-dev). No EXCLUSIONS.
bf16 pad-mask fill path verified: PCC ~0.9999 max_abs ~0.01-0.02. Both acc_dtype fill paths (fp32 + bf16) correct.
